title: #2.17: Hamster gladiators
description: It's not easy being the loser of a fight. Especially not if you're a hamster. This week Flemming is gonna tell us about hamsters and how they lose a fight. Robin's found a paper about a snake finding a snake. A new snake! With a hemipenis! And Mark is bringing a classic to the table. The physics of penguin pooping! Free shipping on the webshop from the 6th - 10th of March with coupon code SHIP19. Use it at checkout -
